data.name: Welcome to the Adventurer Inn!
data.detailed_description:
Fighting monsters and going on epic quests is the job of an adventurer, but even adventurers need to rest!

As the owner of a new inn aimed at catering to adventurers, it is your job to create a comfortable and relaxing environment for them to regain their fighting spirit.

Build up your inn, become friends with the clientele, and become the most famous inn in the land!

Features:

  • A Fantasy Inn Management Sim

  • Furnish Your Inn to Meet the Needs of Your Guests

  • Befriend a Diverse Cast of Characters

  • Hire Adventurers to Fight Through Dungeons and Collect Loot for You

  • Gain Popularity and Become a Famous Innkeeper!
data.about_the_game:
Fighting monsters and going on epic quests is the job of an adventurer, but even adventurers need to rest!

As the owner of a new inn aimed at catering to adventurers, it is your job to create a comfortable and relaxing environment for them to regain their fighting spirit.

Build up your inn, become friends with the clientele, and become the most famous inn in the land!

Features:

data.short_description: Having just opened an inn, you set out to create a comfortable environment to bring in tired adventurers looking for respite after their questing. Earn money, upgrade your inn, and befriend a diverse cast of characters!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
